citations_found.ai_summary: The dispute in this case was about the liability of the Insurance Company, TATA AIG General Insurance Company Limited, to compensate the injuries suffered by the claimant, A.C.Jagadeesann, while driving a vehicle belonging to his son, Lenin Selvakumar, which was insured with the company. The Madras High Court decided on the appeal filed by the Insurance Company against the award and decree passed by the Motor Accidents Claims Tribunal, which had ordered the company to compensate the claimant for his injuries. The court's decision ultimately determined the insurance company's liability to pay compensation to the claimant.
